title: Bibi Kaulan Hospital
readme:
# Bibi Kaulan Ji Hospital

Hospital website with emergency, doctors, departments, OPD timings, appointments, and admin-managed content.

## Target Platform
Database-driven web application with a backend (e.g. Django, headless CMS).

## Recommended Agents
- `healthcare-ux`
- `accessibility-auditor`
- `backend-admin-preserver`
- `designer-mobile`
- `seo-local-search`

## Project Specific Risks
- OPD timings hidden below blank space
- Emergency actions buried
- Doctor and department discovery friction
- Motion interfering with patient tasks
- Admin-editable data becoming hard-coded
plan:
# Bibi Kaulan Ji Hospital Agent Plan

`codebase-recon â†’ healthcare-ux â†’ content-hierarchy â†’ designer-mobile â†’ accessibility-auditor â†’ backend-admin-preserver â†’ interaction-qa-agent â†’ seo-local-search â†’ deployment-verifier`

## Primary risks

- OPD timings hidden below blank space
- Emergency actions buried
- Doctor and department discovery friction
- Motion interfering with patient tasks
- Admin-editable data becoming hard-coded
prompts:
# Bibi Kaulan Ji Hospital Sample Prompts

## Domain UX Prompt
```text
Use healthcare-ux for Bibi Kaulan Ji Hospital.

Make OPD timings visible immediately.
Keep emergency, ambulance, doctors, departments, appointment, and map accessible within minimal taps on mobile.
```

## Backend Preservation Prompt
```text
Use backend-admin-preserver.

Redesign OPD timings and doctor cards while keeping all data editable through Django Admin. Test admin edit to frontend render.
```

title: Gurtejbir Portfolio
readme:
# Gurtejbir Singh Portfolio

Editorial portfolio with route morphs, pinned project scrolling, mixed-ratio project media, and complex mobile behavior.

## Target Platform
Next.js or Vite-based frontend project with GSAP, Lenis, and framer-motion.

## Recommended Agents
- `portfolio-ux`
- `motion-architect`
- `scroll-systems-engineer`
- `route-transition-designer`
- `designer-mobile`
- `visual-qa-agent`

## Project Specific Risks
- Homepage and archive repeating the same spectacle
- Mobile cards and fonts becoming oversized
- Recent Work disabled below desktop breakpoint
- Lenis and ScrollTrigger causing delayed touch
- Artwork forced into one ratio
- Completion claimed without animation-state screenshots
plan:
# Gurtejbir Singh Portfolio Agent Plan

`codebase-recon â†’ portfolio-ux â†’ design-system-extractor â†’ typography-director â†’ motion-architect â†’ scroll-systems-engineer â†’ route-transition-designer â†’ designer-mobile â†’ media-fit-specialist â†’ visual-qa-agent â†’ interaction-qa-agent â†’ deployment-verifier`

## Primary risks

- Homepage and archive repeating the same spectacle
- Mobile cards and fonts becoming oversized
- Recent Work disabled below desktop breakpoint
- Lenis and ScrollTrigger causing delayed touch
- Artwork forced into one ratio
- Completion claimed without animation-state screenshots
prompts:
# Gurtejbir Singh Portfolio Sample Prompts

## Mobile Reconstruction Prompt
```text
Use designer-mobile and scroll-systems-engineer to rebuild the homepage Recent Work pinned carousel for touch devices.
```

## Route Transition Prompt
```text
Use route-transition-designer.

The clicked bottom-navigation pill should expand into the destination page.
Keep signature, Contact, Quick Info, socials, and nav shell mounted.
```

title: House Of Details
readme:
# House of Details

Premium automotive detailing and protection website.

## Target Platform
Static and framework-based modern web project.

## Recommended Agents
- `automotive-ux`
- `designer-mobile`
- `media-fit-specialist`
- `ux-conversion-strategist`
- `seo-local-search`

## Project Specific Risks
- Desktop composition cropped on mobile
- Cinematic visuals overpower service clarity
- Weak booking and WhatsApp flow
- Generic luxury styling
- Before/after proof not prioritized
plan:
# House of Details Agent Plan

`codebase-recon â†’ automotive-ux â†’ design-system-extractor â†’ designer-mobile â†’ media-fit-specialist â†’ ux-conversion-strategist â†’ visual-qa-agent â†’ interaction-qa-agent â†’ seo-local-search â†’ deployment-verifier`

## Primary risks

- Desktop composition cropped on mobile
- Cinematic visuals overpower service clarity
- Weak booking and WhatsApp flow
- Generic luxury styling
- Before/after proof not prioritized
prompts:
# House of Details Sample Prompts

## Audit & Layout
```text
Use automotive-ux for House of Details.

Clarify ceramic coating, PPF, detailing, and correction.
Prioritize before/after proof and WhatsApp booking.
Preserve the black, graphite, silver, and steel-blue identity.
```

## Conversion Optimization
```text
Use ux-conversion-strategist for House of Details.

Primary conversion: WhatsApp inquiry.
Secondary: call and map.
Place service proof and package clarity before the booking ask.
```
